text.headline: Kehan Dong
text.text: Founder, angel investor, and educator building systems around early founders, education, and long-term agency.

text.headline: Duke Kunshan University / Startup Go Camp
text.text: Co-founded and taught SGC, achieving 90.4/100 student rating through innovative teaching methodology combining business cases with personal experience.

text.headline: Global impact
text.text: Inner Journey has transformed 1000+ lives over 25+ years. Angel investing supports early-stage founders globally. Code of Love NGO extends educational impact.
